ol.li: All calculations use unsigned 32-bit sequence arithmetic (Modular 2^32)
Effective window is throttled by the strictest of network or receiver limits.

ul.li: Blue (SND.NXT): Next byte to be sent

div.p: The application can call send() for this amount of data immediately without being blocked by the TCP stack flow/congestion control.

ul.li: Zero Window: If rwnd == 0, usable = 0. Start Persist Timer.
Congestion: If cwnd shrinks below in_flight, usable = 0.
Nagle's Interaction: If usable < MSS, may delay sending (SWS avoidance).
